name: Crustless Potato Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except paprika and bacon in a bowl.
2. Mix well until all components are evenly distributed.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 9-inch pie plate, spreading it out evenly.
4. Sprinkle with paprika.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes or until set.
6. Remove from oven and sprinkle with bacon.
7. Return to oven and bake an additional 5 minutes.
8. Allow the quiche to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
